name: Vercel for Open Source
description: Vercel provides platform credits, community support, and an OSS Starter Pack with third-party credits to power open-source projects.

perks.title: $3,600 Platform Credits
perks.description: $3,600 in Vercel platform credits distributed over 12 months.

perks.title: OSS Starter Pack
perks.description: Credits from third-party services to boost your project.

perks.title: Community Support
perks.description: Priority community support and guidance from Vercel.

eligibility: Must be an open-source project that is actively developed and maintained.
Must be hosted on (or intended to host on) Vercel.
Must show measurable impact or growth potential.
Must follow a Code of Conduct.
Credits must be used exclusively for open-source work.
applicationProcess: Apply through the Vercel OSS program page when applications are open.
Applications are reviewed in seasonal cohorts.
